---
title: "Data Quality Check Report"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float:
      collapsed: false
      smooth_scroll: true
      
params: 
  Stat_Outlier: NA

---
  
## Summary
```{r , echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

N <- length(Stat_Outlier)
Detected <- Stat_Outlier %>%
    purrr::keep(~ !is.null(.x[["iqr_outlier"]][["iqr_indicator"]]) && 
                  .x[["iqr_outlier"]][["iqr_indicator"]] == TRUE)
n <- length(Detected)

summary <- dplyr::tibble(
    Params     = c("Number of variable have been checked", "Variable has outlier detected" ),
    Value   = c(N, n)
    ) 

summary %>% gt::gt()  %>% gt::tab_options(
      column_labels.hidden = TRUE
    )

```
## Explore Outlier 


```{r , echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

item <- Detected [[1]]
print (htmltools::h3(item$DataField) )

```
 
      
::: {style="display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: stretch; width: 100%;"}

:::{style="flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; max-height: 300px; border: 1px solid #eee;"}
  `r  item$iqr_outlier$iqr_df_ab %>% gt::gt()` 
:::
  
:::{style="flex: 1; max-height: 450px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;"}
```{r , echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
  `r boxplot(x = item$Data[[3]],  main = "Outlier based on IQR", col = "lightblue", border = "darkblue")`
```    
:::
        
:::
